title: Principal Research Scientist
description: Lead of the Trustworthy and Assured AI theme (Fundamental Research). Principal Investigator for Project DARTER, developing the safety case for AI decision-support in air traffic management with NATS and a five-partner consortium. Research spanning the Institute's missions in health, environment and sustainability, and defence and national security.

company: University of York, Centre for Assuring Autonomy
title: Visiting Fellow
Senior Researcher in Trustworthy Systems
description: Head of the Innovation and Impact Hub for the Turing Research and Innovation Cluster in Digital Twins. Principal Investigator for the UKRI Trustworthy and Ethical Assurance of Digital Twins (TEA-DT) project. Co-Investigator for the EPSRC Networks of Cardiovascular Digital Twins (CVD-Net) project. Co-Lead for the Uncertainty and Trust Special Interest Group, UKRI Digital Twins Network+

title: Research Fellow
description: Principal Investigator for the Trustworthy Assurance of Digital Mental Healthcare project (UKRI TAS Hub). Co-founder and project lead for the Turing Commons skills and capabilities building project.

title: Senior Research Associate
description: Research Lead for a collaborative project with the Ministry of Justice to co-develop an ethical framework for the use of data science and AI in the criminal justice system

company: Oxford Internet Institute, University of Oxford
title: Postdoctoral Researcher

company: Department of Computer Science, University of Bristol
